---
title: "Data Preprocessing"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

## Load Packages

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
```

## Load Data

```{r}
train_df <- read_csv("data/2008_2018.csv")
test_df  <- read_csv("data/2019.csv")

cat("Training set dimensions:", nrow(train_df), "rows x", ncol(train_df), "columns\n")
cat("Column names:\n")
print(names(train_df))
head(train_df)
```

## Distribution of Total Flights and Delayed Flights

```{r}
ggplot(train_df, aes(x = arr_flights)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 50, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Total Flights",
       x = "arr_flights", y = "Count")

ggplot(train_df, aes(x = arr_del15)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 50, fill = "tomato", color = "white") +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Delayed Flights",
       x = "arr_del15", y = "Count")
```

## Delayed Flights vs Total Flights

```{r}
ggplot(train_df, aes(x = arr_flights, y = arr_del15)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, color = "steelblue") +
  labs(title = "Delayed Flights vs Total Flights",
       x = "Total Flights",
       y = "Delayed Flights")
```

## Check Missing Values

```{r}
# Training set missing values
missing_train <- train_df %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum(is.na(.)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "column", values_to = "missing_count") %>%
  arrange(desc(missing_count))

print(missing_train)
```

```{r}
# Test set missing values
missing_test <- test_df %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum(is.na(.)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "column", values_to = "missing_count") %>%
  arrange(desc(missing_count))

print(missing_test)
```

## Check Data Types

```{r}
str(train_df)
```

## Descriptive Statistics for Key Columns

```{r}
train_df %>%
  select(arr_flights, arr_del15) %>%
  summary()
```

## Preprocess Training Set (2008-2018)

```{r}
# Remove zero-flight records
train_df <- train_df %>% filter(arr_flights > 0)

# Aggregate to monthly level
monthly_train <- train_df %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(
    arr_flights = sum(arr_flights, na.rm = TRUE),
    arr_del15   = sum(arr_del15,   na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(year, month) %>%
  mutate(delay_rate = arr_del15 / arr_flights)

# Create date column
monthly_train <- monthly_train %>%
  mutate(date = make_date(year, month, 1L))

monthly_train %>% select(date, delay_rate)
```

## Modeling Dataset (Training Set)

```{r}
ts_df <- monthly_train %>% select(date, delay_rate)
head(ts_df)
```

## EDA: Total Delayed Flights and Delay Rate Over Time

```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
p1 <- ggplot(monthly_train, aes(x = date, y = arr_del15)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue") +
  labs(title = "Total Delayed Flights", x = NULL, y = "arr_del15")

p2 <- ggplot(monthly_train, aes(x = date, y = delay_rate)) +
  geom_line(color = "tomato") +
  labs(title = "Delay Rate", x = NULL, y = "delay_rate")

library(patchwork)
p1 / p2
```

## Preprocess Test Set (2019)

```{r}
# Remove zero-flight records
test_df <- test_df %>% filter(arr_flights > 0)

# Aggregate to monthly level
monthly_test <- test_df %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(
    arr_flights = sum(arr_flights, na.rm = TRUE),
    arr_del15   = sum(arr_del15,   na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(year, month) %>%
  mutate(delay_rate = arr_del15 / arr_flights)

# Create date column
monthly_test <- monthly_test %>%
  mutate(date = make_date(year, month, 1L))

# Modeling series
ts_test <- monthly_test %>% select(date, delay_rate)

head(ts_test)
```

## Export Cleaned Data

```{r}
monthly_train %>%
  select(year, month, arr_flights, arr_del15, delay_rate) %>%
  write_csv("data/clean_train_monthly.csv")

monthly_test %>%
  select(year, month, arr_flights, arr_del15, delay_rate) %>%
  write_csv("data/clean_test_monthly.csv")

cat("Data saved to data/clean_train_monthly.csv and data/clean_test_monthly.csv\n")
```
